regulations.title: Current Regulations
regulations.description: Check official policies and laws on data protection in Colombia:
regulations.res2238Desc: "Which establishes the Personal Data Treatment Policy of the Ministry/Single Fund of Information and Communication Technologies"
regulations.res2239Desc: "Which updates the Information Security and Privacy Policy, Digital Security and Service Operation Continuity"
regulations.law1581Desc: "Which dictates general provisions for the protection of personal data in Colombia - Habeas Data"
regulations.decree1377Desc: "Which partially regulates Law 1581 of 2012 regarding personal data protection"
regulations.sicDesc: Entity in charge of personal data protection in Colombia. Here you can file complaints and consult the national database registry.

main.title: ANOMALY DETECTION IN DATASETS USING AUTOENCODERS
main.description: The problem of anomaly detection has been studied for several decades due to its relevance in areas such as computer security, financial analysis, medicine, and quality control in industrial processes.
main.description2: Initially, traditional statistical methods, such as mean, variance, or outlier analysis using boxplots, were the main tools used to identify outliers (Barnett & Lewis, 1994).
main.cybersecurity: Cybersecurity: Detection of intrusions and suspicious activities in networks
main.finance: Financial analysis: Identification of fraud and atypical transactions
main.medicine: Medicine: Diagnosis of diseases through abnormal patterns in medical images
main.quality: Quality control: Detection of defects in industrial processes
main.analyzeMessage: This functionality will allow you to upload datasets and detect anomalies using autoencoders.
